summary: Iteration 42 - Dashboard TRANSFORM corrections verified. All backend API tests pass (6/6). Frontend UI fixes confirmed via screenshots.

sales_funnel_jan_2026.note: Percentage > 100% is valid when calls exceed leads

profit_margin.note: API returns raw value, chart clamps to -200%

stat_boxes_overflow.evidence: StatBox uses text-sm and truncate class, values fit

metrics_tab_profit_margin_chart.test: Profit margin chart clamped between -200% and +200%
metrics_tab_profit_margin_chart.evidence: Y-axis shows 0% to -200%, line clamped at bottom

members_tab_chart_legend.test: Members Evolution shows bars (Nouveaux, Perdus) + line (Membres Actifs)

features_verified.4_members_chart_legend_clear: PASS - shows Nouveaux, Perdus, Membres Actifs

critical_code_review_comments: compute_metrics() in backend/models/kpi.py correctly recalculates funnel percentages from raw counts
Dashboard.js clamps profitMargin with Math.max(-200, Math.min(200, k.profit_margin))
Members chart uses ComposedChart with Bar (newMembers, lostMembers) + Line (members)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 verified all TRANSFORM dashboard corrections: (1) Sales funnel percentages now correctly calculated (call=calls/leads*100, sched=scheduled/calls*100, etc.), (2) StatBox text doesn't overflow due to truncate class, (3) Profit margin chart Y-axis clamped to -200% to +200%, (4) Members Evolution chart uses ComposedChart with bars for new/lost members and line for active members with clear legend. March 2026 data: leads=84, calls=42, scheduled=6, show=2, close=1. January 2026 has calls>leads (200>84) resulting in 238.1% which is correct behavior.
